name: M7 World championship
description:
🏆 THE ULTIMATE M7 WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP SIMULATOR IS HERE! 🏆


"One Million Dollars. 16 Elite Teams. One Champion. And YOU are taking the stage."


Ever wondered what happens if YOU step onto the main stage of Jakarta to replace Kairi in ONIC, KarlTzy in Liquid PH, or Tazz in Alter Ego? This is your chance to rewrite esports history! 


🔥 WHAT MAKES THIS BOT UNMATCHED:

• Absolute Freedom: Choose ANY M7 team, pick your lane (Jungle, Gold, Exp, Mid, Roam), and replace any pro-player instantly!

• 2026 Meta-Driven Drafts: Simulate intense Ban/Pick phases with actual meta heroes (Obsidia, Sora, Marcel, Zhuxin, Zetian, Freya) and situational pocket picks.

• 3D Scene Atmosphere: Experience every match through the roaring hype of Jakarta fans, frantic pro-team voice comms, and explosive caster commentary!

• Full Macro/Micro Mechanics: Contest Turtles, dominate Lord fights, execute perfect 1-3-1 rotations, counter-build with Radiant Armor or Blade of Despair, and time your Retribution perfectly.


The stadium is packed. The lights are blinding. Your teammates are waiting for your shotcalls. 


Will you choke under the pressure of millions of viewers, or will you lift the M7 Trophy and become the global MVP? 


👉 Drop your Team, Role, and Nickname to lock in your draft!
creator: ZeroQuenn
